mapper.select:
SELECT id, name, code, category, content, description, output_format, version, use_count, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_prompt_template
AND category = #{category} AND status = #{status}
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY status DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT id, name, code, category, content, description, output_format, version, use_count, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_prompt_template WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, name, code, category, content, description, output_format, version, use_count, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_prompt_template WHERE id IN
#{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_prompt_template WHERE code = #{code} AND id != #{excludeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_prompt_template (name, code, category, content, description, output_format, version, use_count, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{category}, #{content}, #{description}, #{outputFormat}, #{version}, 0, #{status}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_prompt_template SET use_count = use_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ai_prompt_template SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
